purpose: Runtime data contracts for API anomaly detection, vulnerability context, LLM/tool-call security, and labeling.

fields.timestamp: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the observed request
fields.method: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.
fields.url: Request path or URL observed by the gateway/collector
fields.payload_preview: Truncated payload preview for feature extraction and LLM guard checks
fields.attack_tag: Optional label for synthetic or validation probes
fields.is_anomaly: Optional ground-truth label for validation/training data
fields.source: Origin of the event: runtime, traffic, probe, adaptation, test
fields.source_ip: Client IP resolved by gateway, X-Forwarded-For, or request client
fields.tool_name: Optional LLM tool/function name requested by the model
fields.tool_method: Optional HTTP method for LLM/API tool call
fields.tool_endpoint: Optional endpoint targeted by LLM/API tool call
fields.tool_arguments: Optional structured arguments for LLM/API tool call
fields.user_confirmed: Whether the user explicitly confirmed the high-risk action

fields.url: Lowercase normalized URL/path with duplicate slashes collapsed
fields.body_length: Body length preserved from raw event
fields.payload_preview: Payload preview truncated to service limit

fields.anomaly_score: Final behavioral anomaly score f(x) in [0, 1]

fields.vulnerability_weight: Endpoint vulnerability weight V(e), normally in [V_base, 1.5]
fields.cvss: Maximum CVSS score among applicable findings
fields.exploitable: True when runtime evidence confirms practical exploitability
fields.applicable_findings: Findings mapped directly to the endpoint
fields.related_findings: Project-wide or related findings not used as endpoint-applicable risk
fields.mapping_confidence: endpoint, global_related_only, or other mapping confidence marker

fields.thresholds_used: theta1, theta2, anomaly_warn, exploitable, cvss, applicable_findings_count

fields.block_duration_seconds: Temporary block or MFA window duration

fields.prompt: Prompt or untrusted text content to check
fields.context_type: generic, email, document, tool_result, web_page, etc.
fields.risk_zone: Current risk zone before LLM guard escalation

fields.attack_family: sqli, xss, path_traversal, prompt_injection, ssrf, abuse, normal, etc.
